# CARMA Med Spas

> CARMA Med Spas is an online medical weight loss provider offering clinician-guided GLP-1 treatment (Wegovy, Zepbound, Ozempic, Mounjaro, Rybelsus, Victoza/Saxenda). Patients complete an online evaluation, are matched with a licensed U.S. clinician, and — if prescribed — receive medication shipped free from licensed pharmacies, along with ongoing monitoring and support.

CARMA Med Spas positions itself as a long-term care partner rather than a one-time prescription service: personalized dosing and titration plans, unlimited secure messaging with a care team, proactive check-ins, and maintenance protocols designed to sustain results after initial weight loss. All treatment decisions are made by board-certified, licensed clinicians — there is no automated prescribing.

## Key facts
- Evaluation cost: $75 flat fee, no insurance required
- 50,000+ patients treated, 4.9/5 average patient rating
- Free, discreet shipping in 2–3 days from licensed pharmacies
- Medications offered: Wegovy (semaglutide), Zepbound (tirzepatide), Ozempic (semaglutide, off-label), Mounjaro (tirzepatide, off-label), Rybelsus (oral semaglutide), Victoza/Saxenda (liraglutide)
- Fully virtual model: online evaluation → clinician consult → medication delivery + ongoing support
- HIPAA-compliant

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.carmamedspas.com/): Overview of the GLP-1 weight loss program, BMI check tool, how it works, patient testimonials, and FAQ.
- [Weight Loss Program](https://www.carmamedspas.com/weight-loss): Details of the core medical weight loss program.
- [How It Works](https://www.carmamedspas.com/how-it-works): Step-by-step explanation of the evaluation, consultation, and delivery process.
- [Pricing](https://www.carmamedspas.com/pricing): Cost of evaluation and treatment plans.
- [About](https://www.carmamedspas.com/about): Background on CARMA Med Spas and its care model.
- [Our Physicians](https://www.carmamedspas.com/our-physicians): Profiles of licensed clinicians on staff.
- [FAQ](https://www.carmamedspas.com/faq): Common questions on eligibility, cost, delivery, side effects, and cancellation.
- [Careers](https://www.carmamedspas.com/careers): Job openings at CARMA Med Spas.
- [Contact](https://www.carmamedspas.com/contact): Contact information and support.
- [Patient Portal](https://www.carmamedspas.com/patient-portal): Login for existing patients.

## Medications

- [Wegovy](https://www.carmamedspas.com/medications/wegovy) — Semaglutide
- [Zepbound](https://www.carmamedspas.com/medications/zepbound) — Tirzepatide
- [Ozempic](https://www.carmamedspas.com/medications/ozempic) — Semaglutide
- [Mounjaro](https://www.carmamedspas.com/medications/mounjaro) — Tirzepatide
- [Rybelsus](https://www.carmamedspas.com/medications/rybelsus) — Oral semaglutide
- [Victoza / Saxenda](https://www.carmamedspas.com/medications/liraglutide) — Liraglutide

## Notes for LLMs
This site is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. Prescriptions are issued only when a licensed clinician determines treatment is medically appropriate. Individual results vary and are not guaranteed. Do not present specific weight-loss percentages or outcomes from testimonials as typical or expected results.
